recommendations.title: Just a Father
recommendations.overview: Carlo is a doctor that has recently lost his wife. Affected by the loss, he is supported by his family and friends, and, above all, for the love he feels towards his little daughter. And then, one day, he meets Camille.

recommendations.title: L'uomo perfetto
recommendations.overview: Lucia is a young and talented advertiser but is out of luck when it comes to love. Madly in love with her best friend's boyfriend, she struggles with her feelings when they are set to get married.

recommendations.title: Two Stepmoms
recommendations.overview: What would happen if two sworn enemies, two opposed women in temperament and lifestyle find out to share the most incredible legacy: the child of their ex-husband?

recommendations.title: Just Married
recommendations.overview: Nicola, a policeman in Puglia, is a reformed ladies' man with his heart set on marrying the daughter of the Indian ambassador.

recommendations.title: How to Grow Up Despite Your Parents
recommendations.overview: More and more parents take competitive behavior towards the teachers of their children: deny votes and programs, vaneggiano of likes, dislikes, and conspiracies. So, instead of helping in the training of their children, they become insurmountable obs

recommendations.title: In a Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: A closeted boy runs the risk of being outed by his own heart after it pops out of his chest to chase down the boy of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Leave Her to Heaven
recommendations.overview: A socialite marries a prominent novelist, which spurs a violent, obsessive, and dangerous jealousy in her.

recommendations.title: The Best of Youth
recommendations.overview: After a fateful encounter in the summer of 1966, the lifepaths of two brothers from a middle-class Roman family diverge, intersecting with some of the most significant events of postwar Italian history in the following decades.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: The Shadow of the Day
recommendations.overview: In 1938 Italy, after Jews are banned from public life, fascist-abiding restaurateur Luciano nonetheless believes he can still live by his own rules. Everything changes when Anna, a girl with a dangerous secret, begins working at his business.
